name: player_time_to_throw_from_plays range year_offset pools time-to-throw
description: Time-to-throw is a per-dropback mean; a range year_offset pools SUM(time)/SUM(qualifying dropbacks), not SUM of per-season averages.
expected_query: with "t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f" as materialized (select COALESCE(psr_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN time_to_throw IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN time_to_throw ELSE 0 END) as time_to_throw_from_plays_numerator, SUM(CASE WHEN time_to_throw IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as time_to_throw_from_plays_denominator from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by COALESCE(psr_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT SUM(t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f.time_to_throw_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f.time_to_throw_from_plays_denominator), 0) FROM t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f WHERE t4d043ca740216658fcf7143d5502657f.pid = player.pid) AS "time_to_throw_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
